golden_categories.name: Default Currency Validation
golden_categories.description: Validates general currency formats without specific constraints.

golden_categories.name: No Decimal Allowed
golden_categories.description: Validates currency formats where decimals are not allowed.

golden_categories.name: Require Decimal
golden_categories.description: Validates currency formats where decimals are mandatory.

golden_categories.name: Specific Decimal Precision
golden_categories.description: Validates currency formats with specific digits allowed after the decimal.

golden_categories.name: Require Symbol
golden_categories.description: Validates currency formats where a currency symbol is mandatory.

golden_categories.name: Custom Symbol with Negative Sign Before Digits
golden_categories.description: Validates currency formats with a custom symbol and negative sign before digits.

golden_categories.name: Negative Sign After Digits
golden_categories.description: Validates currency formats where the negative sign appears after the digits.

golden_categories.name: Custom Symbol Without Negatives
golden_categories.description: Validates currency formats with a custom symbol and disallows negative values.

golden_categories.name: Custom Symbol with Space and Specific Separators
golden_categories.description: Validates currency formats with a custom symbol, space after the symbol, and specific thousands and decimal separators.

golden_categories.name: Custom Symbol with Space After Symbol
golden_categories.description: Validates currency formats with a custom symbol, space after the symbol, and specific separators.

golden_categories.name: Custom Symbol After Digits
golden_categories.description: Validates currency formats with a custom symbol placed after the digits.

golden_categories.name: Custom Symbol with Negative Sign Before Digits and Space
golden_categories.description: Validates currency formats with a custom symbol, negative sign before digits, and space after the symbol.

golden_categories.name: Custom Symbol Without Negatives and Space
golden_categories.description: Validates currency formats with a custom symbol, disallows negatives, and allows space after the symbol.

golden_categories.name: Parentheses for Negatives
golden_categories.description: Validates currency formats where negative values are enclosed in parentheses.

golden_categories.name: Disallow Negatives
golden_categories.description: Validates currency formats where negative values are not allowed.

golden_categories.name: Custom Brazilian Real Format
golden_categories.description: Validates currency formats specific to Brazilian Real with custom symbol and separators.
